notes.f1: Birth date recovered exactly (10 Mar 1775) but the birth fact carries no place; Albany appears only on the retained Christening fact, not the birth. Right date, incomplete place.
notes.f2: Missed. Agent bounded the death as 'bef 3 Apr 1819' in Albany County from probate/deed reasoning (25 image_transcribe calls on an 1813 deed + 1820 mortgage) instead of the direct Find A Grave record; expected 28 Feb 1819 Niskayuna, Schenectady. Wrong precise date and wrong county.
notes.f3: Missed on the subject. Timed out (120 min) before opening a burial question. The Niskayuna Reformed Church Cemetery burial exists in the tree but on the son Thomas (LCCV-YCQ), not on John Perry.
